client_modules.description: AI Agent client API module입니다. 화면 구성을 소유하지 않고, client가 화면을 구성할 때 필요한 API 의미, 정책, lifecycle, cache 관계를 제공합니다.

namespaces.description: agent 설정과 mutation을 다루는 namespace입니다. agent 이름은 중복될 수 있고 assigned task가 있으면 수정할 수 없습니다.
agent visibility/access 권한을 통해 해당 agent에 연결된 desktop local daemon 상세와 제어 command를 다루는 namespace입니다.
AI Agent 화면 진입 시 필요한 초기 read model입니다. viewer가 볼 수 있는 agent와 device runtime snapshot을 제공합니다.
device와 runtime 상태를 다루는 namespace입니다.
권한이 확인된 principal의 device runtime 목록입니다. assigned agent가 있는 runtime은 삭제되어도 offline 상태로 유지됩니다.
client가 SSE로 수신하는 상태 변경 stream namespace입니다.
AI Agent 온보딩에서 필요한 서버 제공 초기값을 다루는 namespace입니다. 템플릿 엔티티를 만들거나 관리하지 않습니다.
리도, 영실, 홍도, 지원처럼 제품이 제공하는 고정 onboarding fixture 목록과 fixture 기반 agent 생성 진입점입니다.
task thread에서 AI Agent assignment, thread message, compatibility comment action을 다루는 namespace입니다.
task thread에 사용자가 다음 작업 지시를 남기는 정식 message command namespace입니다. Figma의 댓글 표현은 이 thread message로 투영됩니다.

client_modules.description: v2 client API module입니다. workspace-scoped AI Agent API를 riido.v2.aiAgent.* 경로로 제공합니다. v1은 UI 테스트 호환 표면으로 유지됩니다.

namespaces.description: workspace_id path parameter로 범위가 정해지는 AI Agent v2 namespace입니다.
workspace 안에 생성되는 agent 설정과 mutation을 다루는 v2 namespace입니다.
workspace-scoped agent 권한을 통해 daemon 상세와 제어 command를 다루는 v2 namespace입니다.
선택된 workspace의 AI Agent 화면 초기 read model입니다.
account-owned device/runtime을 선택된 workspace agent 권한에 맞춰 읽는 v2 namespace입니다.
선택된 workspace에서 viewer가 볼 수 있는 device runtime 목록입니다.
선택된 workspace 범위로 client가 수신하는 SSE stream namespace입니다.
선택된 workspace에서 빠른 agent 생성을 돕는 onboarding fixture namespace입니다.
서버 제공 fixture 목록과 fixture 기반 agent 생성 진입점입니다. 템플릿 엔티티를 만들거나 관리하지 않습니다.
선택된 workspace의 task thread에서 AI Agent assignment, thread message, compatibility comment action을 다루는 namespace입니다.
선택된 workspace의 task thread에 사용자가 다음 작업 지시를 남기는 정식 message command namespace입니다.

policies.description: Admin은 workspace의 모든 agent를 조회/수정/삭제할 수 있습니다. agent owner는 자신이 소유한 agent에 한해 admin과 동일하게 취급됩니다. non-admin은 자신이 소유한 agent와 다른 사용자의 public agent만 조회합니다.
rules: admin: read public and private agents, update all, delete all
owner: read owned agents, update owned agents, delete owned agents
user: read owned agents and other users' public agents only

policies.description: v2 AI Agent client API는 workspace_id path parameter를 tenant boundary로 사용합니다. workspace 조회/생성은 기존 Riido client/API surface가 소유하고, 선택된 workspace_id만 control-plane에 전달됩니다.
rules: agent: belongs to exactly one workspace_id and stores owner_principal_id as the creator/owner within that workspace
runtime_device: remains account-owned and is not created or owned by a workspace
create: POST v2 agent commands require workspace_id in the URL path and stamp that value server-side; request bodies must not override it
fixture_create: fixture selection creates a normal workspace-scoped agent and does not create an AgentTemplate entity

onboarding_draft_order: Figma node-id=432-46849 lets clients collect a local agent draft/configuration before runtime and workspace selection, but no durable v2 create occurs until workspace_id is in the URL and runtime_id is in the request
read: v2 list/bootstrap/assignable operations return only agents visible within the requested workspace_id
v1_compatibility: v1 routes remain present for existing UI tests, but the authoritative new client surface is v2

policies.description: Desktop은 UserPrincipal session으로 account-owned device를 등록하고, daemon은 device_id와 device_secret으로 DevicePrincipal 인증을 수행합니다. workspace_id는 agent/API scope이며 device owner가 아닙니다.
rules: principal: browser and desktop webview client requests use UserPrincipal authorization
principal: daemon SaaS polling, heartbeat, progress, and command reads use DevicePrincipal authorization
ownership: device and runtime belong to the account/user that registered the device, not to a workspace
ownership: agent belongs to a workspace and stores the creator as owner_principal_id
enrollment: Desktop registers the device only after an established UserPrincipal session exists
credential: control-plane returns device_secret only once at enrollment time and stores only a server-side hash
credential: Desktop stores the credential outside browser/webview JavaScript and injects it into daemon process environment
daemon_headers: daemon sends X-Riido-Device-ID and X-Riido-Device-Secret for SaaS device authentication
no_browser_jwt: daemon must not consume browser JWT or X-Riido-AI-Agent-Token as its long-lived credential
frontend_boundary: riido-client generated APIs must not receive device_secret in schemas, examples, comments, events, logs, or status responses
revocation_future: rotation and revocation are future DevicePrincipal lifecycle operations, not workspace create/list operations

policies.description: AI Agent assignment, AI-Agent-directed task-thread messages, task-thread reads, and task stop actions are generated only for Riido task and subtask surfaces.
rules: target: task_id path parameters represent a Riido task or subtask id
non_target: projects, milestones, intakes, existing AI property filler, and mention surfaces must not reuse task assignment/message/comment/stop/thread operations
client: non-target surfaces may hide, disable, or omit agent UI, but they must not call generated task-scoped AI Agent operations
future: any non-task target surface requires a separate owning SSOT and a newly generated operation

policies.description: agent 삭제 시 예약된 작업은 강제 큐 해제되고 실행 중 작업은 강제 중단됩니다. agent 표시/설정/profile field 수정은 할당된 작업이 없을 때만 허용되며, client는 수정 가능 여부를 mutation 전에 조회하거나 SSE로 받아야 합니다.
rules: delete: unassign queued tasks and force-stop running tasks before confirming deletion
edit: allowed only when assigned_task_count is zero
editability: client가 수정 UI를 활성화하기 전에 query와 SSE로 전달됩니다

policies.description: 데몬이 소유한 runtime 감지 결과가 agent assignment의 online/offline 정책을 결정합니다.
rules: daemon: scan runtimes immediately after start
daemon: scan runtimes every 30 seconds after start
daemon: queue detection results and let the actor model edit state
runtime_deleted_with_assigned_agent: mark runtime offline
runtime_deleted_without_assigned_agent: treat runtime as absent
runtime_reinstalled_same_device: mark runtime online according to online/offline policy only
runtime_detection_error: client에는 offline으로 노출합니다
daemon_control: runtime settings 화면의 daemon 상세, 시작, 재시작, 중지는 SaaS command/read-model을 통해서만 client에 노출합니다
daemon_control_agent_access: desktop local daemon 상세/제어는 agent visibility/access 권한을 기준으로 요청합니다
daemon_control_public_agent: public agent는 같은 workspace 팀원이 해당 agent에 연결된 daemon/runtime을 통해 작업 실행과 daemon 제어 요청을 할 수 있습니다
daemon_control_private_agent: private agent는 같은 workspace admin 또는 owner만 해당 agent에 연결된 daemon/runtime을 통해 작업 실행과 daemon 제어 요청을 할 수 있습니다
daemon_stop_effect: daemon stop이 accepted되면 해당 device의 runtimes는 client에 offline으로 노출되어야 합니다
client: runtime-settings empty and install-card states are composed from device/runtime read-model data without changing liveness semantics
client: runtime-settings current-device and other-device groups are composed from DeviceRecord values; daemon detail/actions are read through agents.daemon generated endpoints with an agent_id
client: provider install-card hover, Windows app waitlist copy, and marketing-consent presentation are downstream client/product facts until a separate owning SSOT adds a generated operation

policies.description: Runtime model dropdown values are runtime-scoped catalog records projected through the device/runtime read model, not top-level API enum values.
rules: runtime: project model candidates as RuntimeModelRecord values under each RuntimeRecord
model_id: treat as an opaque runtime-scoped identifier owned by the selected runtime catalog
label: treat as display data for clients, not a discriminator or generated enum
default: each selectable runtime has exactly one is_default model and omitted model_id resolves to that default

client_required_control: Figma node-id=417-21803 / 432-35544 marks the model dropdown as a required form control, but the API field remains optional because the runtime default model is a deterministic selection
mutation: create/update validates model_id against the selected runtime before saving agent configuration
daemon: consume only the already-authorized model_id selected by the control plane and never define the client catalog

policies.description: control-plane API enum과 union 값은 DSL에서 소유하고 IR에서 보존한 뒤 OpenAPI로 투영되어 Orval/client codegen이 안전한 구분 union을 생성할 수 있어야 합니다.
rules: enum: define as top-level DSL enum, not ad hoc string documentation
sum_type: define discriminator and variants in DSL and IR
openapi: generated projection only
client: OpenAPI projection을 Orval 또는 호환 generator로 소비합니다

policies.description: Daemon reports parsed runtime progress to the control plane as bounded task-thread batches instead of streaming provider tokens directly.
rules: daemon: parse only explicit runtime progress markers such as <riido_log>...<end>
daemon: batch parsed progress lines before SaaS ingest; default cadence is 10 seconds
daemon: flush pending progress before terminal assignment events
server: fan out accepted progress batches through the client event stream as typed task-thread progress events
client: render task-thread progress from typed event payloads and never parse provider raw output

policies.description: Task screens read historical AI Agent task threads through HTTP first and connect the client event stream only when the response advertises an active stream link.
rules: server: return all visible task threads for the requested task as a cold collection
server: persist and return visible task threads even when the assignment/message was created while the viewer was on another screen
server: include at most one active_stream link because one task can have only one active AI agent assignment at a time
server: omit active_stream for completed, stopped, failed, or fully cold task-thread collections
stream: every task-thread progress event carries thread_id so the client updates the targeted thread without inferring from task_id alone
client: never open the SSE stream solely because a task has historical AI Agent thread rows
client: owns long-body scroll/focus, hover, modal, and animation presentation around the returned thread records

policies.description: Figma가 댓글 상호작용으로 표현한 입력은 정식으로 task-thread message이며, 사용자가 해당 thread에 다음 작업 지시를 남기는 command입니다.
rules: client: call tasks.threadMessages.create only after tasks.threads returned a visible thread_id
client: send a message body and optional source_message_id; do not send agent_id because thread_id resolves the target agent
server: accept the message on the targeted active thread as the next instruction for the same thread
server: a completed visible thread can be reactivated by creating a new run in that same thread when no other task thread is active
server: reject the command with conflict when the task already has another active AI Agent thread
server: return the same AIAgentTaskActionResponse shape so clients can update the thread immediately
compatibility: tasks.submitComment remains a legacy route for client surfaces that have not carried thread_id through the UI composition

policies.description: Agent profile presentation fields and server-authored creation/update timestamps are saved with the agent configuration and projected to client bootstrap, task assignment, and update responses.
rules: profile_thumbnail_url: optional HTTPS image URL string; binary upload is outside this contract
description: optional client-authored one-line summary with a maximum of 160 characters; empty string is allowed; client UI owns truncation and wrapping
instruction: optional client-authored text with a maximum of 1000 characters; empty string is allowed
created_at: server-authored RFC3339 date-time stamped when the agent is created; used by clients for list creation dates and absolute-time tooltips
updated_at: server-authored RFC3339 date-time refreshed when editable agent configuration is saved; used by clients for list update dates and absolute-time tooltips
model_id: optional runtime-scoped model selection; omitted create/update values resolve to the selected runtime default
required_form_controls: Figma node-id=417-21803 / 432-35544 says name, runtime, model, and visibility are required controls; profile_thumbnail_url, description, and instruction remain optional values

create: client-facing agent creation stores the same profile fields, binds an authorized selectable runtime_id from the device/runtime read model, stamps owner_principal_id from authorization, and returns created_at and updated_at
mutation: profile fields follow agent_mutation_safety.v1 and ai_agent_rbac.v1

policies.description: AI Agent onboarding fixtures are product-provided initial configuration records for fast agent creation. They are not backend-managed template entities, and selecting one creates a normal agent.
rules: fixture_query: return a stable ordered fixture catalog through onboarding.fixtures so frontend clients do not hard-code fixture names, descriptions, or instructions
fixture: carry name, role_label, description, profile_thumbnail_url, instruction, default_visibility, and recommended_runtime_kind as copyable/default agent configuration values
model: AgentOnboardingFixture does not own model_id; model defaults are derived from the selected runtime model catalog until a separate model recommendation policy is promoted
figma_138_7389: current onboarding fixture rows are 리도, 영실, 홍도, and 지원 in fixture response order
fixture_create: selecting 리도/영실/홍도/지원 calls createAIAgentFromOnboardingFixture with fixture_id plus a complete CreateAgentConfigurationRequest body and creates a normal owned agent

fixture_identity: fixture-created agents keep the submitted display name exactly, may share names with other agents, use agent_id as durable identity and tie-breaker, and remain editable/deletable through normal agent RBAC and editability rules
no_template_entity: the control plane must not expose template create/update/delete APIs or persist AgentTemplate records for this onboarding flow

figma_432_46849: revised onboarding order is interpreted as client-local agent draft/configuration first, then runtime/workspace selection, while final fixture/direct create still requires selected workspace_id and runtime_id
direct_setting: Figma node-id=164-26969 expands 직접 설정 into name, description, and instruction input fields that submit through createAIAgent
direct_setting_row: 직접 설정 is client presentation, not an AgentOnboardingFixture record
direct_setting_presentation: dimmed fixture rows, placeholder copy, row expansion, and scroll affordance are client presentation
no_runtime: when no selectable runtime is detected, clients skip the fixture-selection step and show the no-installed-AI start state

agent_add_visibility: Figma node-id=337-24013 hides the agent-add affordance when the authorized workspace/member device-runtime read model has no selectable runtime; this is client presentation and does not add a separate eligibility endpoint
presentation: clients own scrolling, row selection, pre-selection disabled-next state, truncation, preview skeleton, and preview popover layout

enums.name: RuntimeKind
enums.description: device에 설치되어 device owner가 제어하는 runtime입니다.

enums.name: RuntimeDetectionState
enums.description: actor state reduction 전에 데몬이 감지한 runtime 상태입니다.

enums.name: DaemonAvailability
enums.description: runtime 설정 화면에서 표시하는 desktop local daemon online/offline 상태입니다.

enums.name: DaemonControlAction
enums.description: SaaS가 desktop local daemon에 전달할 수 있는 제어 command 종류입니다.

enums.name: DaemonControlState
enums.description: daemon command가 접수된 뒤 client가 버튼/상태를 표시할 때 사용하는 제어 상태입니다.

enums.name: AgentEditability
enums.description: agent를 현재 수정할 수 있는지 나타냅니다.

enums.name: AgentWorkStatus
enums.description: runtime output과 task assignment state에서 파생된 client 표시용 agent 작업 상태입니다.

enums.name: AgentAssignmentState
enums.description: agent 삭제와 runtime lifecycle에 의해 변경되는 task assignment 상태입니다.

enums.name: AgentTaskCommentKind
enums.description: task thread에 기록되는 AI Agent 상태 update 종류입니다. 기존 comment 필드명은 호환명입니다.

values.description: 선택된 agent가 이미 작업 중이어서 assignment가 queue에 대기합니다.
task participant 배정으로 첫 agent-authored thread row가 생성되었습니다.
agent 삭제로 인해 할당된 작업이 중단되었습니다.
명시적인 사용자 요청으로 할당된 작업이 중단되었습니다.
runtime output에서 진행 상태 update가 생성되었습니다.
runtime output에서 작업 완료 update가 생성되었습니다.
runtime 또는 validation에서 실패 update가 생성되었습니다.

enums.name: ClientKind
enums.description: AI Agent control-plane surface를 소비하는 client 종류입니다.

sum_types.name: ClientStreamEvent
sum_types.description: web과 desktop webview client가 소비하는 SSE event union입니다.

schemas.name: RuntimeModelRecord
schemas.description: runtime이 제공하는 model 후보 record입니다. model_id는 runtime 범위 안에서만 의미가 있는 opaque identifier입니다.

schemas.name: RuntimeRecord
schemas.description: device에 설치되었거나 assignment 정책상 offline으로 유지되는 runtime record입니다.

schemas.name: DeviceRecord
schemas.description: 데몬이 연결된 device와 해당 device에서 감지된 runtime 목록입니다.

schemas.name: DeviceDaemonRecord
schemas.description: runtime 설정 화면에서 agent 권한으로 접근 가능한 daemon 상세 표시와 제어 버튼 상태를 구성하는 read model입니다.

schemas.name: DeviceDaemonDetailResponse
schemas.description: runtime 설정 화면의 agent-bound daemon 상세 row와 상세 패널을 위한 응답입니다.

schemas.name: ControlDeviceDaemonRequest
schemas.description: agent 권한으로 접근 가능한 daemon start/restart/stop command 요청입니다. reason은 audit 표시용이며 화면 표시 정책은 client가 결정합니다.

schemas.name: DeviceDaemonCommandResponse
schemas.description: daemon command가 SaaS에 접수된 뒤 client가 즉시 버튼과 runtime offline 상태를 갱신할 수 있도록 반환하는 응답입니다.

schemas.name: AgentClientRecord
schemas.description: client 화면에 표시하는 agent 요약 record입니다.

schemas.name: AgentClientRecordV2
schemas.description: v2 client 화면에 표시하는 workspace-scoped agent 요약 record입니다.

properties.name: workspace_id
properties.description: agent가 소속된 workspace id입니다. v2에서는 URL path의 workspace_id로 서버가 stamp합니다.

schemas.name: AgentClientListResponse
schemas.description: task 또는 화면에서 표시할 agent 목록 응답입니다.

schemas.name: AgentClientListResponseV2
schemas.description: v2 task 또는 화면에서 표시할 workspace-scoped agent 목록 응답입니다.

schemas.name: AgentClientRecordResponse
schemas.description: 단일 agent 변경 후 최신 agent record를 반환하는 응답입니다.

schemas.name: AgentClientRecordResponseV2
schemas.description: v2 단일 agent 변경 후 최신 workspace-scoped agent record를 반환하는 응답입니다.

schemas.name: AgentOnboardingFixture
schemas.description: AI Agent 온보딩에서 선택할 수 있는 서버 제공 fixture입니다. 템플릿 엔티티가 아니라 agent 생성 폼에 복사할 고정 초기값입니다.

properties.name: fixture_id
properties.description: fixture를 안정적으로 구분하는 ID입니다. 직접 설정 행은 포함되지 않습니다.

properties.name: name
properties.description: 에이전트 생성 폼에 복사할 기본 이름입니다.

properties.name: role_label
properties.description: fixture 목록에 보조로 표시할 역할 라벨입니다.

properties.name: profile_thumbnail_url
properties.description: 에이전트 프로필 이미지로 복사할 HTTPS 썸네일 URL입니다.

properties.name: default_visibility
properties.description: fixture 선택 시 생성 폼에 미리 채울 공개 범위입니다. 기본값은 안전하게 private 값을 사용합니다.

properties.name: recommended_runtime_kind
properties.description: fixture에 권장하는 런타임 종류입니다. 선택 가능 여부는 devices.runtimes로 다시 판단합니다.

schemas.name: AgentOnboardingFixtureListResponse
schemas.description: 온보딩 화면에서 사용할 서버 제공 fixture 목록 응답입니다. 직접 설정은 포함하지 않습니다.

schemas.name: ClientBootstrapResponse
schemas.description: AI Agent 화면 진입 시 필요한 agent와 device runtime 초기 데이터입니다.

schemas.name: ClientBootstrapResponseV2
schemas.description: v2 AI Agent 화면 진입 시 선택된 workspace의 agent와 account-owned device runtime 초기 데이터입니다.

schemas.name: DeviceRuntimeListResponse
schemas.description: 권한이 있는 principal이 볼 수 있는 device runtime 목록 응답입니다.

schemas.name: AgentEditabilityResponse
schemas.description: agent 수정 가능 여부와 차단 사유를 알려주는 응답입니다.

schemas.name: CreateAgentConfigurationRequest
schemas.description: agent 이름, 공개 범위, runtime, model, profile field를 저장하기 위한 생성 요청입니다.

schemas.name: UpdateAgentConfigurationRequest
schemas.description: agent 이름, 공개 범위, runtime 연결을 수정하기 위한 요청입니다.

schemas.name: DeleteAgentResponse
schemas.description: agent 삭제로 정리된 queued/running task 수를 포함한 응답입니다.

schemas.name: AssignAIAgentTaskRequest
schemas.description: task participant dropdown에서 agent를 배정하기 위한 요청입니다.

schemas.name: UnassignAIAgentTaskRequest
schemas.description: task participant에서 agent를 제거하며 active/queued 작업을 중단하기 위한 요청입니다.

schemas.name: SubmitAIAgentTaskCommentRequest
schemas.description: 호환 task comment route로 agent에게 메시지를 전달하기 위한 요청입니다. 정식 command는 CreateAIAgentTaskThreadMessageRequest를 사용합니다.

schemas.name: CreateAIAgentTaskThreadMessageRequest
schemas.description: task thread에 사용자의 다음 작업 지시 메시지를 남기는 정식 요청입니다. thread_id가 target agent를 결정하므로 agent_id를 받지 않습니다.

schemas.name: StopAIAgentTaskRequest
schemas.description: task thread에서 agent 작업을 중단하기 위한 요청입니다.

schemas.name: AIAgentTaskActionResponse
schemas.description: task thread action 요청 이후 client가 즉시 반영할 agent 작업 상태 응답입니다.

schemas.name: DeviceRuntimeSnapshotEvent
schemas.description: device runtime 감지 결과가 갱신되었음을 알리는 SSE event입니다.

schemas.name: DeviceDaemonStatusEvent
schemas.description: agent 권한으로 접근 가능한 daemon 상세/제어 상태가 변경되었음을 client SSE로 전달하는 event입니다.

schemas.name: AgentEditabilityChangedEvent
schemas.description: agent 수정 가능 여부 변경을 전달하는 SSE event입니다.

schemas.name: AgentWorkStatusChangedEvent
schemas.description: agent 작업 상태와 task thread 상태 변경을 전달하는 SSE event입니다.

schemas.name: AgentThreadProgressLine
schemas.description: daemon이 batch로 보고한 runtime 진행 메시지 한 줄입니다.

schemas.name: AgentThreadProgressEvent
schemas.description: 활성 task thread에 추가된 AI Agent 진행 상태를 client SSE로 전달하는 event입니다.

schemas.name: AIAgentTaskThreadStreamLink
schemas.description: 활성 task thread가 있을 때 client가 연결할 SSE stream handoff link입니다.

schemas.name: AIAgentTaskThreadRecord
schemas.description: task 화면에 표시할 AI Agent thread의 cold record입니다.

schemas.name: AIAgentTaskThreadCollectionResponse
schemas.description: task 화면 진입 시 먼저 읽는 AI Agent thread cold collection 응답입니다.

schemas.name: ErrorEnvelope
schemas.description: control-plane API 오류 응답 envelope입니다.

operations.summary: web 또는 desktop webview client의 AI Agent 화면 초기 데이터를 조회합니다

scenarios.name: figma client bootstrap
scenarios.given: a web or desktop webview client opens the v1.22 AI Agent surface
scenarios.when: the client requests bootstrap data
scenarios.then: the response contains visible agents and authorized device/runtime read-model data required by the Figma onboarding, runtime setting, and agent setting screens

scenarios.name: figma agent list timestamps
scenarios.given: the Figma agent list screen shows separate 업데이트일 and 생성일 columns with absolute-time tooltips
scenarios.when: the client requests bootstrap data
scenarios.then: each AgentClientRecord includes server-authored created_at and updated_at values while date formatting and tooltip presentation remain client-owned

scenarios.name: figma agent add button visibility
scenarios.given: the Figma agent settings screen hides 에이전트 추가 when no member-visible runtime is selectable
scenarios.when: the client composes the agent list and add affordance from bootstrap and device/runtime data
scenarios.then: the client can hide the add affordance without a separate eligibility command while createAIAgent still validates the selected authorized runtime_id

scenarios.name: figma onboarding no runtime
scenarios.given: the Figma onboarding flow detects no selectable runtime on the viewer's device
scenarios.when: the client composes onboarding from bootstrap and device/runtime data
scenarios.then: the client can skip fixture selection and show the no-installed-AI start state without adding a new control-plane command

operations.summary: AI Agent 온보딩에서 사용할 서버 제공 fixture 목록을 조회합니다

scenarios.name: figma onboarding fixture selection initial state
scenarios.given: the Figma onboarding fixture-selection screen shows 리도, 영실, 홍도, 지원, a 직접 설정 row, a disabled-looking next button, and a right-side preview skeleton
scenarios.when: the client requests onboarding fixtures
scenarios.then: the response provides the ordered fixtures while 직접 설정, disabled-next, row selection, and preview skeleton behavior remain client presentation without a backend template entity

scenarios.name: fixtures are not templates
scenarios.given: product planning confirms 리도, 영실, 홍도, 지원 are provided onboarding presets and not user-managed templates
scenarios.when: the client reads fixture data
scenarios.then: the API exposes fixture_id and does not expose template_id, template CRUD, or AgentTemplate records

operations.summary: 선택한 onboarding fixture를 기준으로 일반 AI agent를 생성합니다

scenarios.name: fixture creates normal agent
scenarios.given: the user selects 리도, 영실, 홍도, or 지원 during onboarding
scenarios.when: the client sends fixture_id plus the complete agent creation body copied or edited from the fixture
scenarios.then: the response contains a normal owned agent and no AgentTemplate or AgentOnboardingFixture entity is created

scenarios.name: fixture created duplicate name stays normal
scenarios.given: the workspace already has an agent named 리도 and the user creates another agent from the 리도 fixture
scenarios.when: the client sends name 리도 in the complete agent creation body
scenarios.then: the response keeps the submitted display name, returns a distinct agent_id, and the new agent remains a normal editable and deletable agent

scenarios.name: fixture create validates runtime and model
scenarios.given: the client copied fixture defaults but selected a runtime and optional model from devices.runtimes
scenarios.when: the client creates an agent from the fixture
scenarios.then: the API applies the same runtime_id and model_id validation as createAIAgent before saving

operations.summary: 권한이 확인된 principal의 device runtime 상태를 조회합니다

scenarios.name: missing runtime with assigned agent is offline
scenarios.given: a runtime was deleted on a device and at least one assigned agent references it
scenarios.when: daemon scan reports the runtime missing
scenarios.then: the client sees that runtime as offline instead of absent

scenarios.name: missing runtime without assigned agent is absent
scenarios.given: a runtime was deleted on a device and no assigned agent references it
scenarios.when: daemon scan reports the runtime missing
scenarios.then: the client list omits the runtime as if it never existed

scenarios.name: runtime models are scoped catalog records
scenarios.given: the Figma agent setting or add screen opens a model dropdown for a selected runtime
scenarios.when: the client reads device runtime data
scenarios.then: each runtime projects model candidates as RuntimeModelRecord values instead of top-level enum values

scenarios.name: figma onboarding runtime selection
scenarios.given: the Figma onboarding runtime-selection screen shows detected Claude Code and Codex rows plus non-detected OpenClaw and Cursor Agent rows
scenarios.when: the client reads device runtime data
scenarios.then: the client enables only online detected runtime rows for agent creation and renders detected/non-detected labels without adding a runtime-selection command

scenarios.name: runtime settings empty state from read model
scenarios.given: the Figma runtime settings empty-state section shows no current-device runtime, no daemon, provider install cards, or Windows app waitlist variants
scenarios.when: the client reads device runtime data
scenarios.then: the client composes those empty/install/waitlist states from ordinary device and runtime records without adding provider-install or waitlist commands to this API

scenarios.name: runtime settings current and other device composition
scenarios.given: the Figma runtime settings page shows current-device and other-device groups with runtime name/version/status/attached-agent rows plus a current-device daemon row with local details and actions
scenarios.when: the client reads device runtime data
scenarios.then: the response provides ordinary device/runtime records and the client reads daemon details/actions through agent-bound agents.daemon generated endpoints

scenarios.name: runtime settings daemon stop makes runtimes offline
scenarios.given: the Figma runtime settings stop modal says stopping the daemon changes local runtimes to offline
scenarios.when: a stop daemon command is accepted for the current device
scenarios.then: the following device/runtime read model and client stream expose affected runtimes as offline

operations.summary: runtime 설정 화면에서 agent 권한으로 접근 가능한 daemon 상세를 조회합니다

scenarios.name: figma runtime settings daemon details
scenarios.given: the Figma runtime settings current-device daemon row shows 상태, 실행 시간, PID, 데몬 ID, 프로필, 디바이스 이름
scenarios.when: a principal who can use the agent opens the runtime setting screen
scenarios.then: the response contains the daemon detail read model required for those labels without requiring the client to talk to the local daemon directly

scenarios.name: public agent grants daemon detail access
scenarios.given: another workspace member can read a public agent
scenarios.when: they request daemon detail through that agent
scenarios.then: the request is allowed because public agent access delegates indirect runtime execution and daemon command visibility

scenarios.name: private agent daemon detail requires admin or owner
scenarios.given: another workspace member is not admin and does not own a private agent
scenarios.when: they request daemon detail through that private agent
scenarios.then: the request is rejected because private agent access is limited to admin or owner

operations.summary: runtime 설정 화면에서 agent 권한으로 접근 가능한 daemon 시작을 요청합니다

scenarios.name: figma runtime settings daemon start
scenarios.given: the Figma runtime settings current-device daemon row is offline and shows 시작
scenarios.when: a principal who can use the agent requests start
scenarios.then: the response accepts a start daemon command and the client invalidates daemon detail plus runtime read models

operations.summary: runtime 설정 화면에서 agent 권한으로 접근 가능한 daemon 재시작을 요청합니다

scenarios.name: figma runtime settings daemon restart
scenarios.given: the Figma runtime settings current-device daemon row is online and shows 재시작
scenarios.when: a principal who can use the agent requests restart
scenarios.then: the response exposes restarting control_state so the client can show 재시작 중 while waiting for the next status event

operations.summary: runtime 설정 화면에서 agent 권한으로 접근 가능한 daemon 중지를 요청합니다

scenarios.name: figma runtime settings daemon stop
scenarios.given: the Figma runtime settings stop modal says local runtimes become offline
scenarios.when: a principal who can use the agent confirms stop
scenarios.then: the response accepts a stop daemon command, exposes stopping/offline state, and the following runtime read model shows that device's runtimes offline

operations.summary: task participant dropdown에서 할당 가능한 agent 목록을 조회합니다

scenarios.name: participant dropdown visible agents
scenarios.given: a web or desktop webview client opens the Figma task participant dropdown
scenarios.when: the client requests assignable AI agents for the task
scenarios.then: the response includes the viewer's owned agents and other users' public agents only

scenarios.name: participant dropdown owned-first ordering
scenarios.given: visible agents include owned agents and other users' public agents
scenarios.when: the assignable-agent response is returned
scenarios.then: owned agents appear first, display names are ordered inside each ownership group, and equal display names are tied by agent_id

scenarios.name: assignment target scope is task or subtask only
scenarios.given: the Figma additional planning section says only tasks and subtasks can receive Agent assignment
scenarios.when: a client needs AI Agent candidates outside a task or subtask surface
scenarios.then: no generated AI Agent assignable-agent operation exists for projects, milestones, intakes, AI property filler, or mention surfaces

operations.summary: task participant dropdown에서 AI agent를 배정합니다

scenarios.name: participant dropdown assigns agent
scenarios.given: task participant dropdown이 human member와 AI agent section을 구분해 보여줍니다
scenarios.when: client가 보이는 agent 하나를 task에 배정합니다
scenarios.then: 선택된 agent가 busy가 아니면 response는 assignment_started task thread를 생성하거나 반환합니다

scenarios.name: only one active assigned agent per task
scenarios.given: task에 이미 active AI Agent assignment가 있습니다
scenarios.when: client가 participant dropdown에서 다른 agent를 배정합니다
scenarios.then: control-plane은 task당 active agent가 하나라는 invariant를 보존한 뒤 새 active thread를 노출합니다

operations.summary: task participant에서 AI agent를 제거하고 작업을 중단합니다

scenarios.name: participant removal stops agent work
scenarios.given: AI Agent가 task participant로 active 또는 queued 상태입니다
scenarios.when: client가 해당 agent를 task participant에서 제거합니다
scenarios.then: response와 event stream은 stopped_by_user_request를 사용하고, 중지된 row를 숨길지는 client presentation이 결정합니다

operations.summary: active stream link가 있을 때만 이어서 연결할 수 있도록 AI Agent task thread 목록을 조회합니다

scenarios.name: completed task does not open stream
scenarios.given: a client opens a task whose AI Agent work is already completed
scenarios.when: the client requests the task-thread collection
scenarios.then: the response contains historical threads and omits active_stream

scenarios.name: running task advertises one stream
scenarios.given: a task has one active AI Agent assignment
scenarios.when: the client requests the task-thread collection
scenarios.then: the response contains all cold threads and one active_stream link targeting the active thread_id

scenarios.name: reassigned task has multiple threads
scenarios.given: an agent finished work on a task and another agent was assigned later
scenarios.when: the client requests the task-thread collection
scenarios.then: the response returns two or more thread records while active_stream, if present, targets only the currently active one

scenarios.name: assignment created while viewer away
scenarios.given: an AI Agent task thread was created while the viewer was on another screen
scenarios.when: the client later opens the task and requests the task-thread collection
scenarios.then: the response contains the visible persisted thread and advertises active_stream only if that thread is still active

operations.summary: 호환 task comment route로 AI agent에게 메시지를 전달합니다

scenarios.name: legacy comment route routes to running agent
scenarios.given: a legacy Figma task comment route submits a user message to a selected AI agent
scenarios.when: the selected agent is idle and has an online runtime
scenarios.then: the response reports running work and the event stream emits agent_thread_progress batches for the task thread

scenarios.name: legacy comment route queues behind busy agent
scenarios.given: the selected AI agent is already running another task
scenarios.when: a legacy Figma task comment route submits a new user message
scenarios.then: the response reports queued work and the event stream emits queued_by_busy_agent for the task thread

operations.summary: task thread message로 AI agent에게 다음 작업 지시를 전달합니다

scenarios.name: active thread next instruction
scenarios.given: the client has a visible active AI Agent task thread_id from tasks.threads
scenarios.when: the user submits a next instruction message on that thread
scenarios.then: the response reports running work for the same thread_id and the daemon picks up the SaaS command through normal polling

scenarios.name: completed thread new run
scenarios.given: the client has a completed visible AI Agent task thread and no other active AI Agent thread exists for the task
scenarios.when: the user submits a next instruction message on that thread
scenarios.then: the server creates a new run for the same thread_id and returns running work

scenarios.name: rejects other active thread
scenarios.given: a task already has another active AI Agent thread
scenarios.when: the user submits a message to a different historical thread
scenarios.then: the server rejects the command with conflict so the client does not accidentally fan out work to two agents

operations.summary: task thread의 stop action으로 AI agent 작업을 중단합니다

scenarios.name: task stop emits thread status
scenarios.given: the Figma task thread shows a running AI agent response
scenarios.when: the user presses the task stop action
scenarios.then: the response and event stream use stopped_by_user_request so the client can render the stopped agent thread row

operations.summary: Figma agent 추가 화면에서 AI agent 설정을 생성합니다

scenarios.name: agent add screen creates owned agent
scenarios.given: the Figma agent-add screen submits name, visibility, runtime_id, and optional profile fields
scenarios.when: an authorized client creates an agent
scenarios.then: the response contains a new owned agent with zero assigned tasks, editable status, server-authored created_at and updated_at, and the runtime kind derived from the selected runtime_id

scenarios.name: onboarding direct setting creates explicit configuration
scenarios.given: the Figma onboarding direct-setting expansion shows name, description, and instruction fields after the user selects 직접 설정
scenarios.when: the client submits explicit name, description, instruction, runtime_id, and visibility
scenarios.then: createAIAgent saves a normal owned agent without creating an AgentOnboardingFixture, AgentTemplate, or a separate direct-setting operation

scenarios.name: agent create defaults selected runtime model
scenarios.given: the Figma agent-add screen shows a required model dropdown backed by the selected runtime default model
scenarios.when: the client creates an agent without model_id
scenarios.then: the API accepts the omitted model_id, stores the selected runtime's default model_id and model_label, and does not expose a top-level model enum

scenarios.name: agent create rejects model outside runtime catalog
scenarios.given: the client selected runtime-codex but sends a claude-scoped model_id
scenarios.when: the client creates an agent
scenarios.then: the operation is rejected before saving the agent configuration

operations.summary: client control 활성화 전에 agent 수정 가능 여부를 조회합니다

scenarios.name: assigned agent blocks editing
scenarios.given: an agent has one or more assigned tasks
scenarios.when: the client asks whether the agent can be edited
scenarios.then: the response is blocked_assigned_tasks and includes the assigned task count

operations.summary: 할당된 task가 없을 때 agent 표시/설정 필드를 수정합니다

scenarios.name: agent name is not unique
scenarios.given: two owned agents share the same display name
scenarios.when: the owner updates one agent name
scenarios.then: the request is accepted because agent names are mutable and non-unique

scenarios.name: fixture created agent updates as normal
scenarios.given: an editable agent was originally created from an onboarding fixture
scenarios.when: the owner updates its name, profile fields, runtime_id, or model_id
scenarios.then: the operation applies the normal agent mutation safety and does not require fixture-specific state

scenarios.name: profile fields are saved
scenarios.given: an editable agent has no assigned task
scenarios.when: the owner updates profile_thumbnail_url, description, and instruction
scenarios.then: the response and subsequent aiAgent.bootstrap reads contain the saved profile fields, preserve server-authored created_at, and refresh updated_at

scenarios.name: model updates validate against runtime catalog
scenarios.given: an editable agent has no assigned task
scenarios.when: the owner updates runtime_id and model_id
scenarios.then: the operation accepts only a model_id from the selected runtime and stores the matching model_label

scenarios.name: description max length is enforced
scenarios.given: an editable agent has no assigned task
scenarios.when: the owner sends a description longer than 160 characters
scenarios.then: the operation is rejected before saving the agent configuration

scenarios.name: instruction max length is enforced
scenarios.given: an editable agent has no assigned task
scenarios.when: the owner sends an instruction longer than 1000 characters
scenarios.then: the operation is rejected before saving the agent configuration

scenarios.name: edit fails while assigned
scenarios.given: an agent has an assigned task
scenarios.when: the owner attempts to update the runtime binding
scenarios.then: the operation is rejected by mutation safety policy

operations.summary: agent를 삭제하고 queued/running assignment를 강제로 정리합니다

scenarios.name: delete unassigns and stops
scenarios.given: an agent has queued tasks and one running task
scenarios.when: an admin or owner deletes the agent
scenarios.then: queued tasks are unassigned and the running task is force-stopped before deletion is confirmed

scenarios.name: fixture created agent deletes as normal
scenarios.given: an agent was originally created from an onboarding fixture
scenarios.when: an admin or owner deletes the agent
scenarios.then: the operation uses the same delete safety rules and does not preserve any template or fixture entity

operations.summary: editability, work status, runtime snapshot, task-thread progress에 대한 AI Agent client update를 스트리밍합니다

scenarios.name: editability updates before mutation
scenarios.given: a client is viewing an agent setting screen
scenarios.when: the agent gains or loses assigned tasks
scenarios.then: the event stream emits agent_editability_changed before the client allows or blocks editing

scenarios.name: runtime parse status
scenarios.given: an assigned runtime output is parsed for task progress and may include a task-end marker
scenarios.when: the parsed status changes
scenarios.then: the event stream emits agent_work_status_changed with a typed AgentWorkStatus value

scenarios.name: runtime progress batch
scenarios.given: the daemon parses multiple runtime progress markers such as thinking, collection, and web-search updates
scenarios.when: the daemon submits a bounded progress batch to the control plane
scenarios.then: the event stream emits agent_thread_progress with thread_id and ordered progress lines for the task thread

scenarios.name: task thread status update
scenarios.given: the Figma task thread flow shows a queued or stopped agent update
scenarios.when: the assignment state changes
scenarios.then: the event stream includes task_id, assignment_state, and a typed comment_kind for the client thread

operations.summary: web 또는 desktop webview client의 AI Agent 화면 초기 데이터를 조회합니다 (v2 workspace-scoped)
AI Agent 온보딩에서 사용할 서버 제공 fixture 목록을 조회합니다 (v2 workspace-scoped)
선택한 onboarding fixture를 기준으로 일반 AI agent를 생성합니다 (v2 workspace-scoped)

scenarios.name: workspace-scoped fixture agent creation
scenarios.given: a viewer has selected workspace_id workspace-a and an onboarding fixture such as 리도/영실/홍도/지원
scenarios.when: the client calls riido.v2.aiAgent.onboarding.fixtures.createAgent with workspace_id in the URL path
scenarios.then: the server creates a normal workspace-scoped agent from fixture defaults without creating or persisting an agent template entity

scenarios.name: workspace fixture duplicate name stays normal
scenarios.given: workspace-a already has an agent named 리도 and the user creates another agent from the 리도 fixture
scenarios.when: the client calls riido.v2.aiAgent.onboarding.fixtures.createAgent with name 리도
scenarios.then: the response keeps the submitted display name, returns a distinct workspace-scoped agent_id, and uses the normal v2 update/delete/editability operations for later lifecycle changes

scenarios.name: onboarding draft order does not bypass workspace scope
scenarios.given: Figma node-id=432-46849 asks the client to let the user choose or configure an agent draft before runtime and workspace selection
scenarios.when: the client finalizes fixture creation
scenarios.then: riido.v2.aiAgent.onboarding.fixtures.createAgent still requires workspace_id in the URL path and runtime_id in the create request body before any durable agent is saved

operations.summary: 권한이 확인된 principal의 device runtime 상태를 조회합니다 (v2 workspace-scoped)
runtime 설정 화면에서 agent 권한으로 접근 가능한 daemon 상세를 조회합니다 (v2 workspace-scoped)
runtime 설정 화면에서 agent 권한으로 접근 가능한 daemon 시작을 요청합니다 (v2 workspace-scoped)
runtime 설정 화면에서 agent 권한으로 접근 가능한 daemon 재시작을 요청합니다 (v2 workspace-scoped)
runtime 설정 화면에서 agent 권한으로 접근 가능한 daemon 중지를 요청합니다 (v2 workspace-scoped)
task participant dropdown에서 할당 가능한 agent 목록을 조회합니다 (v2 workspace-scoped)
task participant dropdown에서 AI agent를 배정합니다 (v2 workspace-scoped)
task participant에서 AI agent를 제거하고 작업을 중단합니다 (v2 workspace-scoped)
active stream link가 있을 때만 이어서 연결할 수 있도록 AI Agent task thread 목록을 조회합니다 (v2 workspace-scoped)
호환 task comment route로 AI agent에게 메시지를 전달합니다 (v2 workspace-scoped)
task thread message로 AI agent에게 다음 작업 지시를 전달합니다 (v2 workspace-scoped)
task thread의 stop action으로 AI agent 작업을 중단합니다 (v2 workspace-scoped)
Figma agent 추가 화면에서 AI agent 설정을 생성합니다 (v2 workspace-scoped)

scenarios.name: workspace-scoped agent creation
scenarios.given: a viewer has selected workspace_id workspace-a through the existing Riido workspace surface
scenarios.when: the client calls riido.v2.aiAgent.agents.create with workspace_id in the URL path
scenarios.then: the server creates a normal agent stamped with workspace_id workspace-a and owner_principal_id from authorization while the request body cannot override workspace ownership

scenarios.name: onboarding direct draft finalizes only with workspace and runtime
scenarios.given: Figma node-id=432-46849 lets the client collect direct agent configuration before runtime and workspace selection
scenarios.when: the client finalizes direct creation
scenarios.then: riido.v2.aiAgent.agents.create still requires workspace_id in the URL path and runtime_id in the create request body before any durable agent is saved

operations.summary: client control 활성화 전에 agent 수정 가능 여부를 조회합니다 (v2 workspace-scoped)
할당된 task가 없을 때 agent 표시/설정 필드를 수정합니다 (v2 workspace-scoped)
agent를 삭제하고 queued/running assignment를 강제로 정리합니다 (v2 workspace-scoped)
editability, work status, runtime snapshot, task-thread progress에 대한 AI Agent client update를 스트리밍합니다 (v2 workspace-scoped)
